characters.name: Catherine Martin
characters.actor_name: Brooke Smith(The Silence of the Lambsfilm)Marnee Carpenter(Clariceseries)
characters.description: Catherine MartinInformationStatusAliveBehind the scenesFirst appearanceThe Silence of the Lambs(novel)The Silence of the Lambs(film)Last appearanceClaricePortrayed byBrooke Smith(The Silence of the Lambsfilm)Marnee Carpenter(Clariceseries)Catherine Martin galleryCatherine Martinwas the daughter of Senator Ruth Martin. She was the last woman kidnapped byJame Gumb, the serial killer known as “Buffalo Bill”. She was portrayed byBrooke Smithin theSilence of the Lambsfilm, and byMarnee Carpenterin the television seriesClarice. In 1983, a brutal serial killer nicknamed “Buffalo Bill”, had kidnapped and killed at least six women. He flayed their corpses and dumped the bodies in rivers. One evening, Catherine was driving home and spotted a man struggling with a sofa into a van, with his arm in a sling. She offered the stranger help, but was put off by the smell of his chamois (which was made from human skin). The man was grateful for the help, then asked if Catherine was a size 14. Before she could respond, the man clubbed her over the head with his sling, which hid a crowbar. He cut off her dress and threw it out of the van. When Catherine woke up, she was naked and was kept in a well at his basement. The man taunted her, and ordered her to put skin lotion on. When she heard this, as well as seeing scratch marks on the walls, she realized to her horror the man was Buffalo Bill.

When she heard this, as well as seeing scratch marks on the walls, she realized to her horror the man was Buffalo Bill.

characters.name: Chiyoh
characters.description: ChiyohInformationOccupation(s)HandmaidenStatusAliveRelationsRelationshipsHannibal Lecter(Childhood friend)Behind the scenesFirst appearanceSecondoLast appearanceDigestivoPortrayed byTao OkamotoChiyoh galleryChiyohis the maid of Hannibal's auntMurasakiand helpedWill Grahamget his revenge againstHannibal Lecter. She kept Mischa's murderer in a dungeon on the grounds ofCastle Lecterin Lithuania as she refused to let Hannibal kill him. When Will came to Castle Lecter, he released the man in order to eliminate the one thing keeping her in that place. This resulted in Chiyoh killing the man and eventually agreeing to help Will find Hannibal. Chiyoh lives at the Lecter estate in Lithuania, guarding aprisoner; Hannibal told Chiyoh that the prisoner ate his sister, Mischa. Chiyoh is just as much a prisoner as the man she imprisons—unable to kill him or set him free. Will Graham goes to the Lecter estate looking for answers on how to find Hannibal. Not fully believing that the prisoner killed and ate Mischa, as Hannibal claimed, Will sets the prisoner free. The prisoner returns to the cell and pretends to still be locked up until Chiyoh brings his dinner. He then opens the cage and attacks. To save her own life, she kills him. Chiyoh then leaves with Will to find Hannibal. On the train to Italy, Chiyoh shoves Will off the back of the train, revealing that more than anything, she is always Hannibal's protector. Chiyoh proves this several times throughout following episodes by showing up and shooting (with her Remington 700) someone who was about to harm Hannibal. Her protective actions prevented Will from stabbing or capturing Hannibal in episode 6 (Dolce) and saved Jack Crawford from being killed in episode 7 (Digestivo). The last we see of Chiyoh is in Digestivo; she kills men from Muskrat Farm who would've stopped Hannibal from leaving with Will.

He was hunted down byWill GrahamandHannibal Lecktor.

characters.name: Johnny Mogli
characters.description: Johnny MogliInformationOccupation(s)DeputyHenchman for Mason VergerStatusDeceasedBehind the scenesFirst appearanceHannibal (Novel)Last appearanceHannibal (Novel)Portrayed byN/AJohnny Mogli gallery Henchman for Mason Verger Deputy Johnny Mogliis an antagonist in theHannibalnovel. He was a police deputy who worked forMason Verger. It had been mentioned that Mogli had killed people and he was present when Mason hadHannibal Lecterkidnapped.Clarice Starlingarrived to save Lecter and killed Mogli by shooting him twice in the chest.

characters.name: Neal Frank
characters.description: Neal FrankInformationAge40sStatusDeceasedRelationsRelationshipsHannibal Lecter(therapist)Bedelia Du Maurier(therapist)Behind the scenesFirst appearanceAntipastoLast appearanceAnd the Woman Clothed In SunPortrayed byZachary QuintoNeal Frank gallery Neal Frank, was the unnamed patient ofHannibal Lecter'sthat was referred toBedelia du Maurier. Neal is frequently mentioned in conversation between Hannibal Lecter and Bedelia Du Maurier throughout season one and two ofHannibal, and appears in season three. InTome-wanBedelia informsWill Grahamof the attack. In the same instance, informing him that the only crime she witnessed of Hannibal's then, was influence. She further illustrates that, under Hannibal's persuasion, she killed her patient by causing him to swallow his own tongue. In Bedelia's words"It wasn't attached at the time."She continues to believe it was in self-defense, but beyond that point, it was murder.

characters.name: Tommaso Falcione
characters.description: Tommaso FalcioneInformationOccupation(s)Henchman for Mason VergerStatusAliveRelationsRelativesPiero Falcione (brother)Behind the scenesFirst appearanceHannibal (Novel)Last appearanceHannibal (Novel)Tommaso Falcione gallery Tommaso Falcioneis an antagonist in theHannibalnovel. He killed people with his late brother,Piero, and they both worked forMason Verger. WhenHannibal Lecterwas kidnapped and brought to Mason,Clarice Starlingarrived and Piero was eaten by hogs. Mason was killed by his sister,Margot, who also helped Hannibal escape. Margot also helped Tommaso escape before the police arrived.
